name: price-scraper
description: Scrape prices from a set of targets, flag outliers, and update the database.

steps.instruction: Resolve {targets} into a concrete list of sources to scrape for {category}.
steps.title: Select Targets

steps.instruction:
Compare prices across all targets. Flag anything implausible (far above or
below the median) for human review instead of trusting it blindly.
steps.title: Flag Outliers

steps.instruction: Write the validated, non-outlier prices to the database.
steps.title: Update Db
